title: Text message welcome series & AI content generation
summary: Does pre-populated content increase rate at which accounts set welcome series flow live?
hypothesis:
We believe that using AI-generated copy for the text messages within the text message (SMS) welcome series flow workflow will increase the rate at which accounts set the flow live (and, therefore, increase the share of accounts sending SMS on a monthly basis) because users will have greater confidence in the messages.

We will measure success using new SMS sends and new SMS flow sends.
notes: Released today to 50% of eligible accounts. PRD: https://docs.google.com/document/d/1HGjObboTIYqgD78JZ34IWIV4ySsQlon5XLxNsOuOnBA/edit?tab=t.0#heading=h.pw5n5ufxkivs
control_description: The control treatment includes default static copy
treatment_description: Text Message Welcome Series workflow with AI-generated customized and purpose-built message content

treatments.label: Treatment
treatments.description: Text Message Welcome Series workflow with AI-generated customized and purpose-built message content
